_observed: 2026-06-12 base6 paired sweep. A REAL multi-card lot on a Legendary Collection page — 24 assorted cards bundled with the rare. With the bare 'collection' keyword suppressed in set-aware mode, this briefly verified for base6-31-nidoking (its getItem aspects: Set present, Number/Finish/Language ABSENT — absence-tolerant corroboration let it through). The card-count pattern in SET_AWARE_JUNK_PATTERNS must drop it: '24 Legendary Collection Cards' only reads as a count once the set phrase is stripped ('24 Cards'), which is why the patterns scan BOTH title forms.
title: Great Gift For Kids 24 Legendary Collection Cards + Rare Nidoking 31/110 Pokemon
